creator: @quebert
executive_summary: In a mixed regime with SPY overbought (RSI=71.1) and Fear&Greed at 28, the optimal posture is selective quality accumulation in oversold catalysts (PYPL, REGN), AI infrastructure leaders (AVGO, TSM, PLTR), defensive FCF compounders (GILD, NEM, XOM), and streaming recovery (DIS), while aggressively pruning distressed balance sheets (SOFI, RIVN, BIDU, AAL) and overbought positions (FTNT). Portfolio concentration at 15% cash buffer and strict correlation limits provides downside protection if SPY mean-reverts.

macro_environment.summary: Mixed regime with SPY RSI=71.1 signaling near-term overbought conditions; Fear&Greed=28 creates selective entry opportunities in quality names while elevated 10y yield (4.558, rising) pressures long-duration growth multiples.
key_factors: VIX=16.7 complacent but Fear&Greed=28 divergence suggests rotation not collapse
10y yield 4.558 rising — penalizes high-PEG growth, rewards FCF compounders and dividend growers
AI infrastructure spend (AVGO, TSM, PLTR) accelerating despite macro uncertainty
Gold spot ~$3,200+ supports NEM; FDA HDV approval is binary GILD catalyst
SPY RSI=71.1 warrants elevated cash buffer and tight stop discipline

cross_sector_insights.insight: AI ASIC + semiconductor cycle re-accelerating driven by NVIDIA Q1 beat and hyperscaler capex guidance
cross_sector_insights.implication: Overweight TSM and AVGO; correlation limit (max 2 semis) already hit — no new semis beyond these two

cross_sector_insights.insight: Rising 10y yield (4.558) compresses high-PEG multiples but rewards low-PEG FCF names
cross_sector_insights.implication: PYPL (PEG 0.80), AVGO (PEG 0.90), REGN (PEG 1.11) are structurally advantaged; CRM and DIS need multiple re-rating to work

cross_sector_insights.insight: Gold spot >$3,200 + NEM buybacks provide non-correlated portfolio hedge against yield/geopolitical volatility
cross_sector_insights.implication: NEM serves dual role: alpha via FCF strength and macro hedge; size at 6% within materials allocation

cross_sector_insights.insight: Fear&Greed=28 historically precedes mean-reversion rallies within 30-60 days in non-recessionary regimes
cross_sector_insights.implication: Oversold entries (PYPL RSI=12, REGN RSI=31) offer asymmetric upside if sentiment normalizes toward 50

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Gilead Sciences
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: FDA accelerated approval of HDV treatment is a near-term binary catalyst with limited downside given existing HIV franchise FCF and low PEG=2.14 relative to biotech peers.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: FDA HDV approval expands TAM beyond core HIV while Lenacapavir long-acting injectable pipeline sustains multi-year growth; valuation at FPE=14.0 is undemanding for a catalyst-rich franchise.
thesis_invalidators: FDA rejection or clinical hold on HDV
HIV pricing legislation (IRA expansion)
Pipeline safety signal on Lenacapavir
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: active — FDA approval confirmed, catalyst intact

financial_health.health_note: Strong FCF generation, low leverage, Piotroski=8 signals improving fundamentals

risk_adjusted_picks.name: PayPal Holdings
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=12 and FPE=7.7 with PEG=0.80 represent extreme technical and fundamental undervaluation; deep mean-reversion trade with defined risk above $40 support.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: PYPL trades at a 55% discount to fintech peer group on PEG basis; branded checkout monetization recovery and Venmo monetization represent underappreciated earnings drivers into 2027.
thesis_invalidators: Accelerating market share loss to Apple Pay / Google Pay
Regulatory action on BNPL expansion
CFO-level guidance cut below consensus
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: active — no new negative catalysts; excl-oversold entry confirmed

financial_health.health_note: Financial sector Z-score not applicable; Piotroski=8 indicates healthy cash flow and balance sheet metrics

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Broadcom Inc.
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: AI ASIC revenues accelerating with hyperscaler custom silicon deals provides multi-year visibility; PEG=0.90 is remarkably low for a secular AI beneficiary.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: AVGO is the dominant merchant AI ASIC designer for Google TPU and Meta MTIA — custom silicon is a $60B+ TAM growing >40% YoY; VMware integration margin expansion provides earnings floor.
thesis_invalidators: Hyperscaler in-house ASIC builds reducing AVGO share
VMware integration costs exceed guidance
Export control expansion to key Asian customers
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — AI ASIC revenue acceleration confirmed Q1

financial_health.health_note: Post-VMware leverage normalizing; FCF yield remains strong at >8%

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=31 oversold + FPE=11.9 / PEG=1.11 is historically undervalued for a best-in-class dupilumab/oncology platform; Dupixent pipeline expansions in COPD and alopecia areata provide 2026-27 growth catalysts.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Dupixent approaching $15B annualized revenue with 8+ new indications in late-stage trials; VEGF bispecific antibody Eylea HD lifecycle extension and oncology pipeline (Libtayo) provide diversified growth optionality.
thesis_invalidators: IRA drug price negotiation targeting Dupixent (post-2028 risk)
FDA rejection of COPD indication
Biosimilar Eylea erosion faster than modeled
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: updated — excl-oversold entry; oncology thesis intact

financial_health.health_note: Piotroski=4 reflects R&D spend drag on near-term ROA metrics; balance sheet remains net-cash

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Taiwan Semiconductor
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: NVIDIA Q1 record earnings and semicap ETF surge confirm N3/N2 demand acceleration; geopolitical tail risk is the primary discount not a near-term catalyst.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: TSM's N2 node ramp in 2026 drives ASP expansion and share gains from Intel/Samsung; Arizona fab operationalization reduces geopolitical discount over 18-24 months.
thesis_invalidators: Taiwan Strait military escalation
NVIDIA/AMD major capacity shift to Samsung
US CHIPS Act compliance issues at Arizona fab
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — NVIDIA record Q1 confirms demand thesis

financial_health.health_note: Exceptional Piotroski=9; world-class capex efficiency and ROIC>25%

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Newmont Corporation
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Gold spot >$3,200 with rising geopolitical risk and yield uncertainty provides strong realized price tailwind; FPE=9.4 and active buyback program at this gold price is deeply discounted to NAV.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: NEM trades at a 35-40% discount to NAV at $3,200 gold with FCF yield >7%; buyback acceleration signals management confidence in cost structure normalization post-Newcrest integration.
thesis_invalidators: Gold spot drops below $2,800 on USD strength/Fed pivot
Operational disruptions at Tanami or Peñasquito mines
Cost inflation re-acceleration exceeding gold price gains
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — gold momentum intact, buyback confirms thesis

financial_health.health_note: Piotroski=9 top-tier; FCF positive at current gold prices, improving balance sheet post-acquisition

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Palantir Technologies
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Trump endorsement and record AI government contract wins validate the AIP commercial + gov dual-track thesis; RSI=36 offers rare pullback entry in a momentum name.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: PLTR AIP platform is entrenching in both US DoD (Maven Smart System) and enterprise Fortune 500 — government contract backlog provides earnings visibility while commercial ARR is accelerating >40% YoY.
thesis_invalidators: Administration defense spending cuts or PLTR contract deselection
Commercial AIP churn exceeds 15% annually
PEG=1.97 compression if revenue growth decelerates below 30%
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: active — gov contract momentum confirmed, RSI pullback creates add opportunity

financial_health.health_note: Net cash balance sheet, no debt; Piotroski=7 reflects positive operating leverage trajectory

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Walt Disney Company
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Streaming profitability inflection with Disney+ reaching EBITDA positive + parks resilience make FPE=13.7 reasonable; Canada content rules are manageable near-term.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: DIS is in early innings of a streaming monetization cycle — ad-tier subscriber mix shift and password-sharing enforcement drive ARPU expansion; ESPN direct-to-consumer launch in 2025-26 is a significant underappreciated catalyst.
thesis_invalidators: Streaming ARPU growth stalls amid competition from Netflix/Amazon
Parks attendance decline in macro slowdown
Canada content regulation materially restricts Disney+ catalog
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — streaming recovery thesis intact; Canada rules manageable

financial_health.health_note: Gray zone Z reflects legacy media debt load from Fox acquisition; Piotroski=8 shows operational improvement — monitor debt reduction cadence

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Amazon.com
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: AWS reacceleration and advertising segment margin expansion support FPE=27 at current growth rates; no near-term catalyst to add aggressively but thesis intact.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: AMZN is a 3-engine compounder (AWS, Ads, Retail margin) with Project Kuiper optionality; AI inference workloads on AWS Trainium2 create a competitive moat against Azure/GCP.
thesis_invalidators: AWS growth decelerates below 15% YoY
Antitrust breakup of marketplace/logistics
Retail margin contraction from Temu/Shein competition
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — AWS + ads thesis active; no invalidators triggered

financial_health.health_note: Piotroski=5 reflects heavy capex cycle; FCF trajectory strongly positive on AWS margin expansion

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Exxon Mobil
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Brent elevated and Permian/Guyana volume growth support FPE=14.9; natural gas LNG export capacity coming online in 2026-27 provides medium-term upside.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: XOM's Pioneer acquisition fully integrated and synergy realization on track; LNG Canada and Golden Pass LNG provide 2026-28 volume/earnings step-up while $35/bbl breakeven provides downside protection.
thesis_invalidators: Brent drops below $65/bbl on demand destruction
Pioneer integration cost overruns
Accelerated energy transition policy (carbon tax)
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — neutral news, energy thesis holds at current Brent levels

financial_health.health_note: Strong FCF yield ~6%; Piotroski=5 reflects commodity cycle working capital volatility, not structural weakness

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Mastercard
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: Network effects and cross-border volume recovery are durable but European/UK regulatory headwinds on interchange fees create near-term multiple compression risk — hold, do not add.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: MA's two-sided network is near-impossible to replicate; FX-neutral revenue growth ~14% driven by cross-border recovery and emerging market penetration; regulatory risk is manageable long-term but near-term overhang.
thesis_invalidators: EU interchange fee cap expanded to Mastercard network
UK PSR interchange ruling adverse beyond estimates
Real-time payment rails (FedNow/Pix) accelerating displacement
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: active — regulatory headwinds bearish flag; downgrade from add to hold

financial_health.health_note: Financial sector Z not applicable; Piotroski=8, asset-light model with 45%+ net margins

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Salesforce
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: pnl=-23.9% near stop but Agentforce early traction and FPE=12.0/PEG=0.98 argue against capitulating at the low — hold with tight stop, no new capital added.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: Agentforce AI agent platform represents a $50B+ TAM opportunity that could re-rate CRM from a mature SaaS multiple to AI-growth multiple; FPE=12 provides floor but AI rotation risk is real.
thesis_invalidators: Agentforce adoption metrics miss at Dreamforce 2026
AI trade rotation accelerates outflows from legacy SaaS
pnl breaches -25% stop — execute stop-loss discipline
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: new — near stop; hold pending Agentforce adoption data; ALERT: stop at $162

financial_health.health_note: Gray zone Z reflects acquisition-heavy balance sheet (Slack, Tableau); Piotroski=7 shows solid operating metrics

risk_adjusted_picks.name: Fortinet
risk_adjusted_picks.reasoning: RSI=87 is severely overbought — trim 30-40% of position to lock gains and reset entry for potential re-add on RSI normalization to 50-60.
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis: FTNT cybersecurity platform thesis remains intact long-term but technical exhaustion at RSI=87 historically precedes 10-15% mean-reversion pullbacks; reduce exposure and re-enter on weakness.
thesis_invalidators: Major cyber incident driving sector re-rating upward
Competitor breach validating FTNT moat
risk_adjusted_picks.thesis_status: active — overbought signal; trim action required

financial_health.health_note: Healthy FCF and strong retention metrics; trim is tactical not fundamental
